calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-07-2015 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2015 Continued To Dec-23-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-18-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Plaintiff ROBERT ADAMS JR., Tel No. 510-388-8527 appearing in pro per (Non-party CHRISTELLA ADAMS, Mr. Adams' wife, also present);
Atty. SHANE M. CAHILL of Long & Levit LLP, Tel No. 415-438-4594 appearing for Defendant Minami Tamaki, LLP, and Brad Yamuchi.

RULING - Plaintiff did not notify the Court or opposing side of his intent to contest the Court's tentative ruling. The Court denies Plaintiff's request for continuance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS MINAMI TAMAKI, LLP AND BRAD YAMAUCHI DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-18-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Plaintiff ROBERT ADAMS JR., Tel No. 510-388-8527 appearing in pro per (Non-party CHRISTELLA ADAMS, Mr. Adams' wife, also present);
Atty. SHANE M. CAHILL of Long & Levit LLP, Tel No. 415-438-4594 appearing for Defendant Minami Tamaki, LLP, and Brad Yamuchi.

RULING - Plaintiff did not notify the Court or opposing side of his intent to contest the Court's tentative ruling. The Court denies Plaintiff's request for continuance. The Court modified its tentative ruling, and ordered as follows: DEFENDANTS MINAMI TAMAKI, LLP AND BRAD YAMAUCHI'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is deemed moot. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-17-2015 Continued To Oct-28-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2015 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-21-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
